name: Explosion
description: Suffer 4 wounds and lose your next turn.

name: Swinging Blade
description: Test armor. If you fail, you die!

name: Ceiling Collapses
description: The ceiling gives way! Some paths are blocked by debris, while other new paths are revealed. Rotate the chamber tile you are in 90 degrees clockwise.

name: Poisonous Snakes
description: Roll 1 die, suffer a number of wounds equal to the result, and lose that many turns.

name: Crossfire Trap
description: Arrows fire from the walls. Test armor. If you fail, suffer a number of wounds equal to the amount by which you failed.

name: Trapdoor
description: Test agility. If you fail, suffer 1 wound and enter the catacombs.

name: Shuffle
description: Discard this card. Then, shuffle the trap deck and the trap discard pile together. Finally, draw a card from the trap deck and resolve it.

name: Poisonous Gas
description: Roll 1 die, subtract 3 from the result, and suffer that many wounds. Then, roll 1 die, subtract 3 from the result, and lose that many turns.
